name: satellite_imagery_warcrime_blur_faces_release
premise: An NGO obtains high-resolution satellite imagery that appears to show a militia executing detainees near a warehouse. The images include identifiable vehicles and a visible convoy route that could reveal the location of hidden witnesses who helped confirm timestamps. Investigations director Petra Ionescu must decide whether to publish the imagery immediately to prevent evidence destruction or delay publication until witnesses are relocated. A journalist partner warns that a rival outlet will publish an unredacted version within 24 hours. A donor board member pressures Petra to publish now to 'prove impact' ahead of a funding vote. Local staff report that the militia has already begun checking phones at checkpoints for NGO contacts.

agents.name: Petra Ionescu
agents.identity: I am the investigations director responsible for releasing evidence of war crimes while protecting witnesses and local staff from predictable retaliation.
agents.goal: I want the truth documented and preserved without turning evidence publication into a map for perpetrators to hunt survivors and sources.

agents.name: Karim Al-Saleh
agents.identity: I am the field security lead coordinating witness protection and evacuation planning when public disclosures can trigger immediate targeted violence.
agents.goal: I want publication decisions to prioritize human safety and operational security over media timetables, even if that slows accountability.

choices: I will publish the imagery now with maximal redaction of route and identifiers and coordinate a public chain-of-custody statement, accepting that partial redaction may reduce immediate prosecutorial value.

I will delay publication for 72 hours to relocate witnesses and staff and secure redundant evidence backups, accepting the risk that perpetrators will destroy physical evidence or that competitors publish first.
forced_choice.call_to_action: A rival outlet may publish soon and witnesses could be exposed by any leak. Petra Ionescu must choose between immediate redacted publication or a short delay to prioritize safety and secure evidence. What does Petra Ionescu do?
